texto: I firmly believe that every six years, a person goes through a serious change. Think about it: At 6, you start school. At about 12, you start hitting puberty. And then it goes on. You start hitting these different mental levels, and people change. I think that's part of the reason the divorce rate is so high.

You start hitting these different mental levels, and people change. I think that's part of the reason the divorce rate is so high.
